name: Scrambled Eggs with Chorizo Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the chorizo sausage into an unheated 10-inch skillet.
2. Slowly cook the sausage for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Drain off any excess fat.
3. In a medium bowl, beat together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper with a fork.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the sausage in the skillet.
5. Cook without stirring over low heat until the eggs start to set on the bottom and sides of the skillet.
6. Lift the cooked portions of the eggs so that the uncooked portion can run underneath them. Continue to lift and fold for 2 to 3 minutes until the eggs just begin to fully set.
7. Stir in the chopped tomato and continue cooking until the eggs are cooked through but remain glossy and moist.
8. Serve hot.
